example:
You should eat your vegetables.
你应该吃你的蔬菜。

The coach blew the whistle to start the game.
教练吹响口哨开始比赛。

I took medicine to feel better when I was sick.
我生病时吃了药感觉好些了。

He wears a belt to keep his pants up.
他戴着腰带来固定裤子。

The explorer used a torch to see in the dark cave.
探险家用手电筒在黑暗的洞穴里看东西。

We rode down the snowy hill on a sledge.
我们坐雪橇从雪山上滑下来。

I like to eat biscuits with my tea.
我喜欢和茶一起吃饼干。

Tom carried his books and lunch in a rucksack to school.
汤姆把书和午餐装在一个背包里带到学校。

She has already finished her homework.
她已经完成了作业。

I have a cat.
我有一只猫。
They had lunch at noon.
他们中午吃了午饭。
She has had enough sleep.
她已经睡够了。
He is having breakfast.
他正在吃早餐。
I can see the stars.
我能看到星星。
She saw a rainbow.
她看到了彩虹。
We have seen the movie before.
我们之前看过那部电影。
They are seeing their friends.
他们正在见朋友。
forms: have → had → having → see → saw → seen → seeing

example:
I can't decide what to eat.
我不知道吃什么。
She decided to go home.
她决定回家。
I have decided to study harder.
我已经决定更加努力学习。
He is deciding which book to read.
他正在决定读哪本书。

I read a book during the flight.
我在飞行期间读了一本书。

I sleep early every night.
我每晚都早睡。
She slept very well last night.
她昨晚睡得很好。
I have slept enough today.
我今天已经睡够了。
The baby is sleeping now.
宝宝正在睡觉。

He plays games on his tablet.
他在平板上玩游戏。
We have two tablets in our house.
我们家有两个平板。

She called her friend on the telephone.
她通过电话给朋友打电话。
Many telephones were ringing in the office.
办公室里许多电话响着。

I use the phone to call my mom.
我用电话给妈妈打电话。
There are many phones in the store.
商店里有很多电话。

I use my iPhone to play games.
我用我的苹果手机玩游戏。
They both have new iPhones.
他们都有新的苹果手机。

I need a match to light the candle.
我需要一根火柴来点燃蜡烛。
The matches are in the drawer.
火柴在抽屉里。
This shirt and pants match well.
这件衬衫和裤子很配。
She matched the socks after washing.
她洗完后配对袜子。
I have matched the puzzle pieces.
我已经把拼图块配对好了。
They are wearing matching outfits.
他们穿着配套的服装。

This puzzle is easy.
这个拼图很容易。
Math is easier than science for me.
对我来说，数学比科学更容易。
This game is the easiest to play.
这个游戏是最容易玩的。

The elephant is large.
大象很大。
This box is larger than that one.
这个箱子比那个箱子大。
He built the largest sandcastle on the beach.
他在海滩上建了最大的沙堡。

The elephant is large.
这头大象很大。
The blue whale is larger than the elephant.
蓝鲸比大象更大。
The blue whale is the largest animal.
蓝鲸是最大的动物。

The bear lives in a cave.
熊住在洞穴里。
There are many caves in the mountains.
山里有很多洞穴。

I eat breakfast every morning as a meal.
我每天早上吃早餐作为一顿饭。
We have three meals a day.
我们一天吃三顿饭。

I find the hidden toy.
我找到了藏起来的玩具。
She found a penny on the ground.
她在地上发现了一枚硬币。
We have found the lost cat.
我们已经找到了丢失的猫。
He is finding the answers to his homework.
他正在找作业的答案。

The pool is very deep.
这个游泳池很深。
The lake is deeper than the river.
湖比河更深。
The ocean is the deepest place on Earth.
海洋是地球上最深的地方。
